integration_instructions: 1. Clone the AAVA- repository from kramya1106

2. IMPORTANT: This test case is NOT part of the AURA framework's intended domain (HP Instant Ink subscription management). It tests generic user registration functionality that does not exist in the application under test.
3. Before integrating, verify that the application actually has a user registration page at the URL configured in RegistrationHelper.navigate_to_registration_page()
4. Update the registration_url in helper/registration_helper.py to point to the actual registration page URL
10. Inspect the actual registration page in the application and update locators in RegistrationPage if needed
11. Run the test to verify: pytest test_flows/TestC44873515VerifyUserRegistrationFlow/test_c44873515_verify_user_registration_flow.py
12. RECOMMENDATION: Consider whether this test case should be part of the AURA framework or moved to a separate test suite for user management functionality

This test case tests functionality outside the AURA framework's intended domain (HP Instant Ink subscription management).
All page objects and helpers were created from scratch as no existing AURA components match this test case's requirements.
The registration page URL in RegistrationHelper is a placeholder and MUST be updated to the actual application URL before running the test.
Locators in RegistrationPage use generic selectors and may need adjustment based on the actual application's HTML structure.
The test creates multiple browser sessions (one per step) which is inefficient. Consider refactoring to use a single session for the entire flow once the page objects are validated.
